docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED JUL-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $909.00 FILED BY JOHNSON-PIPKINS, MADOREE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON-PIPKINS, MADOREE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON-PIPKINS, MADOREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUSSELL, BRANDON $909.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $994.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT HER HOME THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: I-PAD WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
